title: Ronald Reagan Day
doc_html:
§58.3.  Ronald Reagan Day

To honor one of America's greatest presidents, February sixth shall annually be recognized and designated as Ronald Reagan Day throughout the state of Louisiana.

Acts 2004, No. 680, §1.
